HattrickData:
- : unsigned Integer The globally unique UserID.
: String The 'username' or 'nickname' used in Forums and around the site.
: String The current level of Hattrick Supporter that the user has. Empty if not a Supporter.
- : String Repeter with Login Time information
- : unsigned Integer The globally unique LanguageID.
: String The language name.
- : unsigned Integer The globally unique CountryID.
: String The country name
- : String The name of the currency.
: Decimal Decimal value specifying the relative currency rate to SEK (swedish krona).
- - : unsigned Integer The globally unique TeamID.
: String The full team name
: GenderID The gender of the team.
: LeagueSystemID The system type of the league for the team.
- : unsigned Integer The globally unique ArenaID.
: String The arena name.
- : unsigned Integer The globally unique LeagueID
: String The League name.
: unsigned Integer The Current Season.
- : unsigned Integer The globally unique CountryId
: String The Country name.
- : unsigned Integer The globally unique LeagueLevelUnitID.
: String The name of the LeagueLevelUnit
- : unsigned Integer The globally unique RegionID.
: String The Region name
- : unsigned Integer If the Team has a Youth academy the ID is represented here.
: String If the Team has a Youth academy the team name is represented here.
- : unsigned Integer The globally unique YouthLeagueID.
: String The name of the youth league.
- - : unsigned Integer The globally unique NationalTeamID.
: String The name of the national team.
- - : unsigned Integer The globally unique NationalTeamID.
: String The name of the national team.
- : URI The URL to the card background-image. This will show a silouette for non-supporter teams.
- : URI The URL to the bodypart item.
